/home/runner/work/ezLibs/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/clang++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/EzLibs_TestApp.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/EzLibs_TestApp.dir/TestEzApp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EzLibs_TestApp.dir/TestEzArgs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EzLibs_TestApp.dir/TestEzBuildInc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/EzLibs_TestApp.dir/main.cpp.o -o EzLibs_TestApp
